hero.title: APOSONÍA
hero.subtitle: A sound art project by Gaetano Cappella

intro.heading: What Sound Reveals When We Learn to Listen

map.title: Five Listening Stations
map.instruction: Click each numbered marker to reveal the soundscape

station1.title: Station 1 — Port Entrance
station1.text: At the threshold between city and sea, cargo vessels generate low-frequency pressure waves that saturate the acoustic environment.

station2.title: Station 2 — Northern Shallows
station2.text: Shallow waters amplify anthropogenic noise through reflection. Fish communication signals are detectable only in brief intervals.

station3.title: Station 3 — Central Gulf
station3.text: The acoustic centre of the gulf. Multiple noise sources overlap continuously, creating a masking effect that disorients cetaceans.

station4.title: Station 4 — Southern Passage
station4.text: Industrial facilities emit tonal noise through underwater structures. A persistent 50Hz hum underlies all other sounds.

station5.title: Station 5 — Eastern Inlet
station5.text: A semi-enclosed area where sound accumulates. Recreational boat traffic peaks in summer, fragmenting the acoustic habitat.

about.title: About the Project
about.culture_moves: This project was developed during a Culture Moves Europe residency (March–May 2026), funded by Creative Europe / Goethe-Institut.

hero.title: APOSONÍA
hero.subtitle: Un progetto di sound art di Gaetano Cappella

intro.heading: Cosa rivela il suono quando impariamo ad ascoltare

map.title: Cinque Stazioni d'Ascolto
map.instruction: Clicca ogni marker numerato per ascoltare il paesaggio sonoro

station1.title: Stazione 1 — Ingresso del Porto
station1.text: Alla soglia tra città e mare, le navi cargo generano onde di pressione a bassa frequenza.

station2.title: Stazione 2 — Bassi Fondali Nord
station2.text: Le acque basse amplificano il rumore per riflessione.

station3.title: Stazione 3 — Golfo Centrale
station3.text: Il centro acustico del golfo. Più fonti di rumore si sovrappongono continuamente.

station4.title: Stazione 4 — Passaggio Sud
station4.text: Impianti industriali emettono rumore tonale attraverso strutture subacquee.

station5.title: Stazione 5 — Insenatura Est
station5.text: Area semi-chiusa dove il suono si accumula.

about.title: Sul Progetto
about.culture_moves: Progetto sviluppato durante una residenza Culture Moves Europe (marzo–maggio 2026), finanziato da Europa Creativa / Goethe-Institut.

hero.title: APOSONÍA
hero.subtitle: Un proyecto de arte sonoro de Gaetano Cappella

intro.heading: Lo que revela el sonido cuando aprendemos a escuchar

map.title: Cinco Estaciones de Escucha
map.instruction: Haz clic en cada marcador para escuchar el paisaje sonoro

station1.title: Estación 1 — Entrada del Puerto
station1.text: En el umbral entre ciudad y mar.

station2.title: Estación 2 — Aguas Poco Profundas Norte
station2.text: Las aguas poco profundas amplifican el ruido por reflexión.

station5.title: Estación 5 — Ensenada Este
station5.text: Área semi-cerrada donde se acumula el sonido.

about.culture_moves: Proyecto desarrollado durante una residencia Culture Moves Europe (marzo–mayo 2026), financiado por Europa Creativa / Goethe-Institut.

map.title: Πέντε Σταθμοί Ακρόασης

station2.title: Σταθμός 2 — Βόρεια Ρηχά
station2.text: Τα ρηχά νερά ενισχύουν τον θόρυβο.
